title: Indoor Aerobic Control
objective: Preserve aerobic frequency with a controlled 1-hour indoor ride while outdoor rain blocks the road option.
why_now: Saturday became a family-rest day and Sunday is forecast rain. A short indoor aerobic ride keeps rhythm without creating catch-up fatigue.

targets.notes: Indoor trainer. 60 minutes at 50-68% FTP. Keep it conversational. This replaces the missed Saturday frequency ride, not the full long ride.

warmup.notes: Easy ramp. Let the legs come around.

steps.notes: Easy aerobic. Include 3 x 3 min at 95-100 rpm if it stays smooth.

nutrition.pre: Normal meal timing is enough. If starting hungry, take 20-30g carbs 30-60 min before.
nutrition.during: Water to thirst. Carbs are optional, not required, unless you start hungry.
nutrition.post: Normal meal with 25-35g protein and some carbs is enough.
nutrition.centr_recipe: Swirled Banana & Oat Pots if this is before breakfast or Salted Caramel Super Smoothie if a meal is delayed: https://centr.com/recipe/show/32848/swirled-banana-oat-pots, https://centr.com/recipe/show/12693/salted-caramel-super-smoothie
nutrition.supplements: Today's workout needs: none required. Daily baseline only if already part of routine.

recovery.post_session: Normal meal, fluids to thirst, and easy walking if legs feel stiff.
recovery.next_morning_check: Check legs, left calf, sleep, resting HR/HRV if available, and whether the indoor ride felt genuinely easy.

skill_focus.action: Use 3 x 3 min at 95-100 rpm only if power stays capped.
skill_focus.why: This keeps the cadence skill from Friday alive without adding intensity.

skill_focus.action: Keep upper body quiet and hands light.
skill_focus.why: Relaxed posture supports smooth indoor pedaling and reduces wasted tension.

mental_focus.why: The missed long ride is dropped, and this session should help the week absorb rather than become another stressor.
mental_focus.reset: If you start chasing watts, shift easier, exhale once, and ride 2 minutes below the cap.

pre_interval_cues: Do this only if you have a clean 60-minute window.
If family timing is messy, skip without debt.
during_workout_cues: Finish fresher than a real workout.
execution_notes.success_criteria: Easy ride feels easy and Monday does not need catch-up.
